data.body: AC0 proven LIVE against the real origin GitHub remote (github.com:navapbc/rebar) on 2026-07-04: a blob-pointing refs/reconciler/* ref pushed, was advertised by git ls-remote at exactly the blob OID, fetched back with payload byte-for-byte intact, and deleted. GitHub accepts blob-refs under refs/reconciler/* → ref->blob primary path used, ref->commit fallback not needed. Artifacts: scripts/prove_ref_lock_ac0.sh (repeatable proving command, run live) + tests/external/test_ref_lock_ac0_live.py (external-tier, passed against origin under REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL=1) + hermetic bare-remote test. ADR 0031 updated with the proof.
